message:
feat: add GF(256) verification tests, ECS object model, and glossary module

Three substantial additions to the FrankenSQLite codebase:

crates/fsqlite-harness:
- lib.rs: Add comprehensive GF(256) finite field verification test
  module (+607 lines) with property-based tests (proptest) validating
  mul/add/addmul operations against a reference oracle implementation
  using the 0x11D irreducible polynomial. Tests verify commutativity,
  associativity, distributivity, identity, inverse, and slice operations
  against the RaptorQ codec's Gf256 implementation.
- tests/gf256_verification.rs: Standalone 459-line test file for
  GF(256) verification harness

crates/fsqlite-types:
- src/ecs.rs: New 179-line Entity Component System (ECS) object model
  with ObjectId and PayloadHash types for content-addressable storage
- src/glossary.rs: New 762-line glossary module defining domain
  terminology and type mappings
- Cargo.toml: Add blake3 workspace dependency for content hashing
- src/lib.rs: Export new ecs module with ObjectId and PayloadHash types

Also: beads issue tracker sync, Cargo.lock updated for new deps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
